trigger.description: Workspace hygiene could not determine whether the Beads DB and .beads/issues.jsonl have diverged. The pure-parse classifier downgrades any otherwise-positive verdict to BeadsExportOnly carrying this code. Emitted when the `bd doctor` shell-out is unavailable, fails, or when the caller is running the deferred-RCH slice without DB inspection.
setup_commands: # In a temporary workspace, mutate .beads/issues.jsonl on disk without running `br sync --flush-only` to create a DB/JSONL divergence the hygiene classifier cannot resolve without bd doctor

repair_strings: Run `br sync --flush-only` to reconcile the Beads DB with the JSONL export.
Run `br doctor` to inspect tracker state and confirm DB/JSONL alignment.
